{{Quote|No one enters Borkeen, that strip of shattered space debris; no one, for no one ever returned — save me.|"[[Sosakar]]," from the first chapter of "[[The Slug Named Grendel]]"|<ref name="Grendel">{{WEGCite|story=The Slug Named Grendel (short story)|book=The Star Wars Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref>}}
The '''Borkeen Belt''' was a group of stone and iron [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]]. It was said to be the remains of a destroyed [[Planet/Legends|planet]], and was notorious for destroying ships that entered it.<ref name="Grendel" />

The largest [[Exogorth/Legends|space slug]] ever discovered (as of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]), an 80-meter specimen, was discovered in this belt. Bestselling author [[Rogar Farnoster]], who had accompanied the [[University of Sanbra]] scientists who investigated the slug,<ref name="HNN" /> placed [[Grendel (space slug)|the namesake antagonist]] of his novel "[[The Slug Named Grendel]]" in this belt.<ref name="Grendel" />
